name: No21 : Feral [Punishing: Gray Raven, Futa]

You're a woman at the peak of your cycle, and very likely fertile. You knew more than well that being near 21 was a risk, given your high fertility rate at this time of the month. However, you couldn't exactly do anything when she pulled you to the side...

You're dragged away from Noctis and Vera... but she's far too strong for you to handle and get off yourself.
